title: This changes EVERYTHING...
author: Real Civil Engineer
description:

#realcivilengineer #timberborn #timberborners
Real Civil Engineer faces a major challenge as a bad tide threatens the beaver colony. To protect the settlement from incoming contaminated water, Real Civil Engineer implements new automated systems and redesigns the industrial layout. Strategic dam construction and careful water management become essential to ensure the colony survives the approaching environmental hazards.
